# Streamline Dumpsters Ltd. — Full Reference

> Locally owned dumpster rental and junk removal company serving Central Ohio. Transparent flat-rate pricing, same-day delivery, no hidden fees. Fully insured (Progressive Commercial) and DOT certified. Based in Dublin, Ohio. Owner-operated with a focus on honest pricing and reliable service.

## Services

### 14-Yard Dumpster Rental

Streamline Dumpsters currently offers a 14-yard roll-off dumpster at a flat rate of $319 + 8% Ohio sales tax, totaling $344.52. The price includes delivery, a 3-day rental period, up to 4,000 lbs of debris, pickup, and driveway protection boards. A 10-yard and 20-yard dumpster are both coming soon. All three sizes include the same 4,000 lb weight allowance and flat-rate pricing model.

Additional rental days are available at $15/day with no strict maximum rental duration. Weight overages beyond 4,000 lbs are charged at $75/ton. Same-day delivery is available for bookings placed before 2 PM. The dumpster measures approximately 14 feet long by 7.5 feet wide by 4 feet tall, equivalent to 4–5 pickup truck loads of debris.

Items must be loaded at or below the top rim of the dumpster walls. Debris cannot extend above the walls — overfilled dumpsters cannot legally be transported on public roads. If a dumpster is overfilled at pickup, the customer must remove excess items before the driver can haul it away. Early pickup is always free; customers call or text when they are done and the dumpster will be retrieved.

### Junk Removal

Streamline Dumpsters also offers full-service junk removal, where the crew goes inside the home or onto the property, carries items out, loads them, and hauls them away. The customer does not need to lift anything. Pricing is based on volume and job size rather than a flat rate; customers text photos of the items to be removed to (614) 636-2343 for an instant quote.

Junk removal is well-suited for estate cleanouts, post-renovation cleanup, heavy furniture and appliance removal, garage and basement cleanouts, and situations where the customer cannot or does not want to do the physical labor of loading. Since Streamline offers both services, a customer can use dumpster rental for a renovation phase and junk removal for a cleanup phase — one company, coordinated through one contact.

## What We Accept

The following materials are acceptable in the dumpster or for junk removal pickup:

**Furniture:** Couches, sofas, loveseats, recliners, chairs, tables, desks, dressers, nightstands, bed frames, mattresses, box springs, bookshelves, entertainment centers, armoires.

**Appliances:** Washers, dryers, refrigerators, freezers, stoves, ranges, dishwashers, water heaters, dehumidifiers, window AC units. Note: refrigerators and freezers accepted in dumpster only if refrigerant has been professionally evacuated; otherwise, junk removal service handles proper disposal.

**Construction and Demolition Debris:** Drywall, lumber, flooring (hardwood, laminate, vinyl), tile, carpet and padding, cabinets, countertops, trim and molding, doors, windows, roofing shingles (up to approximately 2,000 sq ft of material), decking boards, fence panels.

**Yard Waste and Outdoor Items:** Branches, brush, sod, landscaping debris, old fencing, deck materials, patio furniture, grills, play equipment, dirt and soil (note: soil and concrete are heavy and count toward the weight limit quickly).

**General Household Items:** Boxes, storage bins, clothing, books, toys, electronics (TVs, computers, printers), exercise equipment, holiday decorations, general clutter.

## What We Do Not Accept (Prohibited Items)

The following materials are prohibited from dumpster rental and junk removal due to legal disposal requirements or safety concerns:

- **Liquid paint** — dried or solidified paint in cans is acceptable; liquid paint in any form is not
- **Paint solvents and thinners** (mineral spirits, acetone, paint thinner)
- **Motor oil, transmission fluid, antifreeze**, and other automotive fluids
- **Pesticides, herbicides, and fertilizers** in liquid or concentrated form
- **Household chemicals and cleaning solvents** (bleach, ammonia, pool chemicals)
- **Asbestos-containing materials** — requires licensed abatement contractor
- **Medical or biohazardous waste** (needles, medications, blood-contaminated materials)
- **Propane tanks** and other compressed gas cylinders
- **Tires** — require separate recycling disposal
- **Automotive and lithium batteries** — require separate recycling
- **Items containing active refrigerants** (refrigerators, freezers, AC units with intact refrigerant lines)

Customers unsure whether a specific item is accepted should call (614) 636-2343 before loading.

## Booking & Payment

Online booking is available 24/7 at https://sl-dumpsters.com/bookNow.html. The booking form collects delivery address, preferred delivery date, and payment information. Payment is processed by credit or debit card through Square at the time of booking. There is no separate deposit — the full rental price is collected upfront.

Same-day delivery is available when booking is completed before 2 PM on the desired delivery day. For next-day or future scheduling, bookings can be placed at any time. Customers can also call (614) 636-2343 during business hours to book by phone.

## Delivery & Pickup Process

**Delivery:**
1. Customer books online or calls to schedule
2. Driver calls ahead to give the customer a heads-up before arriving
3. Dumpster is delivered to the specified address (driveway or designated spot)
4. Protection boards are placed automatically under the dumpster to prevent driveway damage — no extra charge
5. Customer does not need to be home for delivery

**During the Rental:**
- Customer fills the dumpster at their own pace over the rental period
- Items must stay at or below the top rim at all times
- Extensions can be requested by calling (614) 636-2343 at $15/day

**Pickup:**
1. Customer calls or texts (614) 636-2343 when ready for pickup — no need to wait until the last scheduled day
2. Early pickup is always free
3. Dumpster is retrieved; weight is calculated at the disposal facility
4. Overage charges (if any) are billed if total weight exceeds 4,000 lbs
5. Customer does not need to be home for pickup

## Pricing — Complete Breakdown

| Item | Cost |
|---|---|
| 10-yard dumpster rental (base) | Coming Soon |
| 14-yard dumpster rental (base) | $319.00 |
| 20-yard dumpster rental (base) | Coming Soon |
| Ohio sales tax (8%) | $25.52 |
| **Total at booking** | **$344.52** |
| Additional rental days | $15.00/day |
| Weight overage | $75.00/ton beyond 4,000 lbs |
| Driveway protection boards | Included |
| Delivery | Included |
| Pickup | Included |
| Early pickup | Free |
| Fuel surcharge | None |
| Rush fee (same-day) | None |

No hidden fees. No fuel surcharges. No rush fees for same-day service. The price quoted is the price paid, subject only to actual weight overage if debris exceeds 4,000 lbs.

## Weight Reference Guide

Weight overages are the most common unexpected cost in dumpster rental. The 4,000 lb included weight is generous for light to medium projects, but heavy materials can exceed the limit quickly.

| Material | Approximate Weight per Cubic Yard |
|---|---|
| Household junk / furniture | 100–300 lbs |
| General construction debris | 300–500 lbs |
| Carpet and padding | 200–400 lbs |
| Drywall | 400–600 lbs |
| Roofing shingles (single layer) | 750–1,000 lbs |
| Roofing shingles (multi-layer tearoff) | 1,000–1,500 lbs |
| Hardwood flooring | 600–1,000 lbs |
| Tile (ceramic/porcelain) | 1,500–2,000 lbs |
| Concrete/brick/masonry | 2,000–3,000 lbs |
| Soil / dirt | 1,500–2,500 lbs |
| Yard waste (dry) | 200–400 lbs |
| Yard waste (wet) | 400–800 lbs |

For roofing projects: a standard roof tearoff covering 2,000 sq ft typically generates 2,000–3,500 lbs depending on number of shingle layers. This fits within the 4,000 lb limit in most single-story residential cases.

## Project Sizing Guide

Streamline Dumpsters currently offers a 14-yard dumpster (available now) and has a 10-yard and 20-yard dumpster coming soon. The 14-yard handles the vast majority of residential and light commercial projects.

| Project Type | Fits in 14-Yard? | Weight Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Bathroom remodel (full gut) | Yes | Light — typically under 2,000 lbs |
| Kitchen remodel (full gut) | Yes | Moderate — 1,500–3,000 lbs with tile/cabinets |
| Garage cleanout | Yes | Light to moderate |
| Basement cleanout | Yes | Light to moderate |
| Estate cleanout (3-bedroom) | Usually yes | Light — furniture and household items |
| Deck removal (average size) | Yes | Moderate — lumber and hardware |
| Roof tearoff (up to 2,000 sq ft) | Yes | Moderate to heavy — watch weight |
| Whole-house renovation | May need 2 rentals | Heavy and high volume |
| Concrete or masonry removal | Yes (small amounts) | Very heavy — 4,000 lbs limit reached fast |

For projects that may exceed one dumpster, customers can rent a second unit or call to discuss phased pickups and re-deliveries.

## Neighbor Sharing

Customers may share a dumpster rental with a neighbor. One person books the dumpster; it is delivered to their property; the neighbor uses available space. Streamline does not require separate contracts or charges for neighbor-sharing arrangements.

The person who books is the account holder and is fully responsible for everything in the container: contents, total weight, fill level compliance, and any overage fees or issues. If a neighbor places prohibited items in the container, the account holder is responsible. Ground rules (what goes in, scheduling, cost split, weight awareness) should be agreed on between neighbors before loading begins. Common cost-split approaches: 50/50, proportional by volume used, or proportional by weight of materials contributed.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does a dumpster rental cost?**
$319 + 8% Ohio sales tax = $344.52 total. Price includes delivery, 3 days, 4,000 lbs, driveway protection boards, and pickup.

**What dumpster sizes do you offer?**
Three sizes — one available now, two coming soon:
- **10-Yard** *(Coming Soon)*: 12ft x 8ft x 4ft tall. Best for small cleanouts, single-room remodels, garage decluttering, light landscaping debris.
- **14-Yard** *(Available Now)*: 14ft x 8ft x 4ft tall. Most popular. Kitchen/bathroom remodels, garage cleanouts, roofing up to 2,000 sq ft, estate cleanouts.
- **20-Yard** *(Coming Soon)*: 14ft x 8ft x 6ft tall. Large renovations, whole-house cleanouts, roofing over 2,000 sq ft, commercial debris.

**Is same-day delivery available?**
Yes. Book before 2 PM for same-day delivery.

**Do I need to be home for delivery or pickup?**
No. The driver will call ahead before arriving, but the customer does not need to be present. Just designate a placement location when booking.

**How do I request pickup?**
Call or text (614) 636-2343 when ready. Early pickup is always free. If no pickup is requested, the dumpster is retrieved on the last day of the rental period.

**Can I keep the dumpster longer than 3 days?**
Yes. Extensions are $15/day with no maximum duration. Call or text to extend.

**What if my project finishes early?**
Call for early pickup at no charge. You only pay the base rate and any weight overage — unused days are not refunded, but early pickup is always available.

**What happens if I go over the 4,000 lb weight limit?**
Weight overage is charged at $75/ton beyond 4,000 lbs. The charge is calculated when the dumpster is weighed at the disposal facility after pickup. The customer is notified of any overage after the fact.

**How full can I fill the dumpster?**
Items must be at or below the top rim of the dumpster walls. Nothing can extend above the walls. This is a legal requirement for transporting on public roads. If overfilled at pickup, excess items must be removed before the driver can haul it.

**Will the dumpster damage my driveway?**
Protection boards are placed under the dumpster at delivery automatically and at no extra charge. This distributes weight to prevent cracking and surface damage on concrete and asphalt driveways.

**Can I put the dumpster on grass?**
Yes, with the same protection boards used for driveways. The boards help distribute weight and prevent excessive ground compression. Best placement is always a paved surface when available.

**Can I put the dumpster on the street?**
Street placement may require a permit from the local municipality. Requirements vary by city. Dublin, Hilliard, Powell, Upper Arlington, Worthington, and Columbus each have different permit processes. Customers planning street placement should check with their city before scheduling delivery. Streamline can advise on local requirements.

**What payment methods do you accept?**
Credit and debit cards via Square. Payment is collected at the time of booking.

**Can I rent more than one dumpster?**
Yes. Customers can rent multiple dumpsters for large projects, phased projects, or multi-household use. Call to arrange multi-unit delivery.

**Can my neighbor share my dumpster?**
Yes. The account holder is responsible for all contents and weight. See the Neighbor Sharing section above.

**Do you serve my area?**
Streamline serves Dublin, Hilliard, Powell, Upper Arlington, Worthington, Plain City, all Columbus zip codes, and greater Central Ohio. Call (614) 636-2343 to confirm availability for locations not listed.

**What can I put in the dumpster?**
Furniture, appliances, construction debris, roofing shingles, yard waste, household junk, electronics, carpet, flooring, and general cleanout materials. See the full accepted and prohibited materials lists above.

**What can't I put in the dumpster?**
Liquid paint, solvents, motor oil, automotive fluids, pesticides, household chemicals, asbestos, medical waste, propane tanks, tires, batteries, and items with intact refrigerant lines. See the full prohibited items list above.

**What's the difference between junk removal and dumpster rental?**
Dumpster rental: we deliver a container, you fill it yourself over 3+ days. Junk removal: we come inside your home, carry everything out, load it, and haul it away — you do no lifting. Dumpster rental is better for multi-day projects and DIY renovations. Junk removal is better when you want labor included, when items are inside the house, or when you need everything gone in a single visit.

**How do I get a junk removal quote?**
Text photos of the items to (614) 636-2343 for an instant quote.

**Are you insured and licensed?**
Yes. Fully insured through Progressive Commercial and DOT certified for waste hauling.

**Do you charge fuel surcharges or rush fees?**
No. Same-day delivery has no extra fee. There are no fuel surcharges. The price you book is the price you pay, subject only to actual weight overage.

**What is the Fill-osopher?**
A 24/7 AI chatbot on the Streamline Dumpsters website that answers common questions about pricing, scheduling, prohibited items, and service availability. Available at any hour even outside business hours.

## Service Area

### Dublin, OH (Primary Market)
Zip codes 43016 and 43017. Dublin is the company's home base and primary service area. The company has extensive experience with Dublin's HOA regulations, permit requirements, and residential neighborhoods. All service types are available with priority scheduling.

### Hilliard, OH
Zip codes 43026 and 43221. Full service availability including same-day delivery. Hilliard is a high-demand residential market with significant renovation and cleanout activity.

### Powell, OH
Zip code 43065. Full service availability. Powell is an active residential market in Delaware County with frequent home renovation projects.

### Upper Arlington, OH
Zip codes 43220 and 43221. Full service availability. Upper Arlington is a dense suburban market with older housing stock undergoing frequent kitchen, bathroom, and basement renovations.

### Worthington, OH
Zip codes 43085 and 43235. Full service availability. Worthington is a suburban market with regular demand for estate cleanouts and home renovation projects.

### Plain City, OH
Zip code 43064. Full service availability. Plain City serves both residential and rural customers in Madison and Union counties west of Columbus.

### Columbus, OH
All Columbus zip codes served. Columbus represents a large portion of service demand, including urban residential, suburban, and contractor customers across all neighborhoods.

### Greater Central Ohio
The company serves the broader Central Ohio region beyond the listed cities. Customers outside the primary service area are encouraged to call to confirm availability before booking.

## Site Pages

### Home — https://sl-dumpsters.com/
The homepage introduces Streamline Dumpsters and its core value proposition: transparent flat-rate pricing, same-day delivery, and locally owned service. It includes an overview of the 14-yard dumpster rental and junk removal services, a booking call-to-action, customer reviews, before-and-after project photos, and a service area section. The page is designed to convert first-time visitors into customers via online booking or a phone call.

### Book Now — https://sl-dumpsters.com/bookNow.html
The online booking page allows customers to schedule a dumpster rental directly on the website. It collects delivery address, preferred delivery date, rental duration, and payment information. Payment is processed via Square (credit/debit card). The booking system is available 24/7. Same-day delivery is available for bookings completed before 2 PM.

### FAQ — https://sl-dumpsters.com/faq.html
A comprehensive frequently asked questions page covering topics including: what size dumpster is needed for common projects, what materials are prohibited, how weight overages are calculated, how delivery and pickup work, whether the customer needs to be home, how to protect the driveway, rental period and extension options, and the difference between dumpster rental and junk removal.

### Contact — https://sl-dumpsters.com/contact.html
A contact page with a form for general inquiries, along with direct phone number (614) 636-2343 and email (Eli@Sl-Dumpsters.com). Also displays business hours. Customers can use this page for quotes, scheduling questions, or any service-related communication.

### Service Area — https://sl-dumpsters.com/service-area.html
An overview of all cities and communities served by Streamline Dumpsters in Central Ohio. Includes a map and city-by-city breakdown of service availability. Helpful for customers outside the primary Dublin market who want to confirm service to their location.

### Blog — https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/
A resource library of articles about dumpster rental, junk removal, and waste management for Central Ohio homeowners and contractors. Topics include cost comparisons, project-specific guides, placement tips, seasonal advice, local regulations, and first-timer walkthroughs. Updated regularly with new posts.

### Blog Posts

- [DIY Hauling vs Dumpster Rental: Which Saves You Money?](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/diy-hauling-vs-dumpster-rental-cost-comparison) — Detailed cost breakdown comparing self-hauling debris versus renting a dumpster. Covers truck rental, fuel, dump fees, and time costs often overlooked by homeowners doing the math.

- [Dumpster Placement Tips: Where to Put It on Your Property](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/dumpster-placement-tips-property-guide) — Guidance on choosing the right placement location for a rental dumpster. Covers ground conditions, driveway protection, clearance requirements, access needs, and seasonal considerations.

- [Kitchen & Bathroom Remodel Dumpster Rental Guide](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/kitchen-bathroom-remodel-dumpster-rental-guide) — Project-specific guide for homeowners and contractors doing kitchen or bathroom renovations. Covers debris types, weight considerations by material, donation options, and contractor coordination.

- [How Long Can You Keep a Rental Dumpster?](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/how-long-keep-rental-dumpster-columbus) — Explains rental period options: 3 days included, $15/day extensions, no strict maximum. Includes project duration estimates for common project types to help customers plan their rental period.

- [First Time Renting a Dumpster? Here's What to Expect](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/first-time-renting-dumpster-what-to-expect) — Step-by-step walkthrough of the dumpster rental process for first-time renters. Covers booking, delivery day, how to fill the dumpster correctly, prohibited items, and pickup.

- [Junk Removal vs Dumpster Rental: Which Do You Need?](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/junk-removal-vs-dumpster-rental-columbus) — Comparison of full-service junk removal versus self-load dumpster rental. Explains which service is better suited to different project types, timelines, and physical ability levels.

- [Can You Share a Dumpster Rental with Neighbors?](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/can-you-share-dumpster-rental-neighbors-columbus) — Explains how neighbor-sharing arrangements work, who holds responsibility, how to split costs fairly, ground rules to agree on before sharing, and scenarios where sharing makes the most sense.

- [Roofing Dumpster Rental for Contractors in Columbus](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/roofing-dumpster-rental-contractors-columbus) — Guide for roofing contractors on weight management, shingle load calculations, driveway protection, and same-day delivery logistics for roofing projects.

- [Spring Cleaning & Garage Cleanout Dumpster Rental](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/spring-cleaning-garage-cleanout-dumpster-rental-columbus) — Advice for Columbus homeowners tackling spring garage cleanouts and whole-house decluttering projects. Covers prohibited items, booking timing during peak season, and wet weather weight considerations.

- [How to Maximize Space in Your Dumpster Rental](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/maximize-dumpster-space-loading-tips-columbus) — Loading techniques to get the most out of a 14-yard dumpster. Covers common mistakes that waste space and force customers to rent a second dumpster or pay overage fees.

- [Winter Dumpster Rental in Columbus: Ice, Snow & Safety](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/winter-dumpster-rental-safety-columbus) — Safety guidance for renting a dumpster during Ohio winters. Covers ice accumulation, frozen debris, safe loading practices, and delivery considerations in cold weather.

- [Transparent Dumpster Rental Pricing in Columbus](https://sl-dumpsters.com/blog/posts/transparent-pricing-columbus-dumpster-rental) — Full pricing breakdown explaining exactly what customers pay and why. Covers the flat $319 rate, tax, weight overages, extensions, and how Streamline's pricing compares to competitors with hidden fees.

## Contact

- **Phone/Text:** (614) 636-2343
- **Email:** Eli@Sl-Dumpsters.com
- **Location:** Dublin, Ohio
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 7 AM–10 PM | Sat 8 AM–10 PM | Sun 10 AM–4 PM

## About

Streamline Dumpsters Ltd. is a locally owned and operated dumpster rental and junk removal company headquartered in Dublin, Ohio. The company is fully insured through Progressive Commercial and DOT certified for waste hauling. Owner Eli founded the business on the principle that dumpster rental should be straightforward — one flat price, reliable delivery, and no surprises.

The company serves homeowners, contractors, estate managers, and property managers across Central Ohio. It competes primarily on pricing transparency, same-day delivery reliability, and customer service quality. There are no fuel surcharges, no rush fees for same-day service, and no hidden charges of any kind beyond actual weight overage.

The website features a 24/7 AI chatbot called the "Fill-osopher" that answers common questions about pricing, scheduling, prohibited items, and service availability. Customers can also book online, call or text directly, or text photos of junk removal jobs for instant quotes.
